requirements.name: body_sealer
application_notes: Apply sealer at body panel joints.
Refer to model-specific body repair manual for application locations.
Clean and degrease sealer application area before application.
Remove excess weld-through primer using reducer.

requirements.name: undercoating
application_notes: Apply undercoat over underbody and wheelhouse surfaces.
Clean and degrease undercoating areas before application.
Mask suspension, drivetrain, exhaust, and part installation areas where necessary.
Use spray equipment designed for undercoat.

requirements.name: urethane_foam_repair
application_notes: Replace removed expandable urethane foam through holes on inner body panels as directed in the model-specific body repair manual.
Required where expandable urethane foam was used instead of traditional acoustic separators.

source.document: Honda Repairing Major Body Damage - Anti-Rust Treatment Before Painting
